name: Sandy Beach
description: You are standing on a wide sandy beach along the eastern bank of a fast-moving river. The sand here looks less natural than accumulated, deposited gradually by water that never asked where it should stop. A path follows the river south, worn smooth by repetition. To the northeast, a passage has been partially swallowed by drifting sand, its outline still visible enough to suggest someone expected to come back. A shovel lies nearby, positioned as if uncovering things was once considered a routine task.
